name: FBC Holding, Inc.
business: FBC Holding, Inc. (FBCD) sells the FBC Flowboard, a skateboard with a patented Deep Carve System that allows carving at 45-degree angles. The company also licenses and sells other extreme sports products such as the Snowskate and Snowchuck. Its target customers are extreme sports enthusiasts, including surfers, snowboarders, and skateboarders, primarily aged 12-30.
sellsTo: retailers such as Sports Authority, Best Buy, Amazon

exposures.sentence: We specialize in translating licensing, branding concepts and intellectual property into tangible products including toys, figures, housewares and collectibles.

catalysts.sentence: Next year we plan to reintroduce a 42 inch professional model.

tamClaims.claim: The extreme sports hard goods market is over $2 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: The market, targeted at 12-30 year olds, is estimated to be over $2 billion according to TransWorld Skateboarding Magazine on hard goods only.

tamClaims.claim: The toy industry is $21 billion per year.
tamClaims.sentence: ... in the $21 billion dollar per year toy industry.
